CustomField.description: Apex class name for custom Notification Channel implementation. Must implement UoWInterfaces.INotificationChannel. Leave blank to use default Salesforce Notification Channel.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Fully qualified Apex class name (e.g., MyCustomNotificationChannel) that implements UoWInterfaces.INotificationChannel. Leave blank to use default UoWDefaultNotificationChannel.
CustomField.label: Notification Channel Class Name
